name: Moravian Sand Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and powdered sugar together until light and fluffy.
2. Add one egg at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Sift the flour and baking soda together in a separate bowl.
4. Gradually mix the sifted flour mixture into the butter and egg mixture.
5. Chill the dough in an ice box overnight.
6. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Roll out the chilled dough on a floured surface until it is thin.
8. Cut the rolled dough into round shapes.
9. Press half a pecan into the center of each sand tart.
10. Bake in the preheated oven for about 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
